title: 10 Sheets of Christmas Tissue Paper Traditional Present Wrapping Paper Gift Wrap with Seal Tabs (Silver Snowflakes)
features: Add some layers to your wrapping, or a festive touch to gift bag items such as bottled items or perfume.
Themed sealing stickers are also included with each pack.
Three beautiful designs to choose from.
Each design is traditionally festive and gives off a positive Christmas feel, perfect for gifts this year.
